title: Approval queue resolution: pending -> approved executes, reject is a no-op

turns.name: seed-pending-sign-approval
turns.text: Start the NDA signing flow, but get my approval before anything is sent.
turns.responseText: Queued the Acme NDA signing flow for approval before anything is sent.

parameters.reason: Counsel needs the Acme NDA countersigned before Friday.

result.text: Queued the Acme NDA signing flow for approval before anything is sent.

raw.text: Queued the Acme NDA signing flow for approval before anything is sent.

turns.name: owner-approves
turns.text: Yes, go ahead and approve the NDA signing request.
turns.responseText: I’m unable to locate the NDA signing request to approve it. Could you please resend the request or provide its ID?

result.text: Approved the signature request for "Acme NDA", but DocumentRequest signature-b6961371-c7b7-46d8-ad0d-9b0005fc2953 no longer exists (the document store does not survive restarts) — nothing was dispatched. Please re-issue the signature request.

raw.text: Approved the signature request for "Acme NDA", but DocumentRequest signature-b6961371-c7b7-46d8-ad0d-9b0005fc2953 no longer exists (the document store does not survive restarts) — nothing was dispatched. Please re-issue the signature request.

failedAssertions: responseJudge: score 0.00 < 0.7: The assistant failed to confirm approval and instead claimed it could not locate the request.

turns.name: seed-second-pending-sign-approval
turns.text: Also queue the vendor MSA for signature, again behind my approval.
turns.responseText: Queued the Vendor MSA signing flow for approval before anything is sent.

parameters.reason: Vendor MSA needs signature but terms are still under review.

result.text: Queued the Vendor MSA signing flow for approval before anything is sent.

raw.text: Queued the Vendor MSA signing flow for approval before anything is sent.

turns.name: owner-rejects
turns.text: Actually no — reject the Vendor MSA signing request, do not send it.
turns.responseText: The Vendor MSA signing request has been rejected and will not be sent.

result.text: The Vendor MSA signing request has been rejected and will not be sent.
